summary: Crisp sound‑board capture of a high‑energy ’93 show with standout Casey Jones, Comes A Time and an explosive Eyes→Estimated sequence.
review: Fans rave about the tight playing, hot Jerry solos and memorable moments like Casey Jones, Comes A Time and the muscular Eyes→Estimated jam. The SBD source is generally clean and crisp, though a few listeners note flat‑sounding sections and high‑hat clipping on Days Between.

ai_rating.rationale: Over 20 reviews overwhelmingly praise the performance (average 4‑star show rating) and the soundboard recording is described as crisp and digitally flawless, with only minor flatness or clipping issues.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, hiss‑free SBD; many call it “digitally flawless” and “crispy”. A few note the mix can sound flat at times and a high‑hat clipping artifact on Days Between.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for strong song selection and tight playing; second set builds momentum with a muscular Eyes→Estimated jam, smooth segue into Comes A Time, and an overall energetic pacing that keeps the crowd engaged.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Powerful, hot solos (Bertha, long solo on Comes A Time) and “sick” licks noted by several reviewers.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass described as bouncing in the back during Estimated; solid foundation throughout.
band_member_comments.Drums: High‑hat clipping on Days Between noted; drums sometimes “hot in the mix.”
